name: Red Bean Dip
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cup cooked red kidney beans or u
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the red beans.
2. Mix the beans with spices in a blender for a few minutes until they are pureed.
3. Add more Tabasco to taste.
4. Mix well.
5. Serve hot or at room temperature.
6. Serve with crackers or chips. Yields 1-1/2 cups.
